Container.Name: GPS-Backend trip
Container.Overview: Proof-of-concept Spring Boot GPS tracking backend with REST, WebSocket live updates, in-memory H2 database, and Swagger UI. Internal container port is fixed at 8080; only the host port should be changed in Unraid.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: Port mapping for the backend. Leave Container Port at 8080 and only change Host Port when needed.

Config.Name: Spring Profile
Config.Description: Spring profile used inside the container
